testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_accepts_types_field

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'rock' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb19ded5b2c0>('TEST_iter12_rock') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb19ded5b2c0> = {'TEST iter12 dark': 'dark', 'TEST iter12 rock': 'rock'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration12.py:136: in test_bulk_upload_accepts_types_field assert created_types.get("TEST_iter12_rock") == "rock" E AssertionError: assert None == 'rock' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb19ded5b2c0>('TEST_iter12_rock') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb19ded5b2c0> = {'TEST iter12 dark': 'dark', 'TEST iter12 rock': 'rock'}.get
